sections.name: Personal Information
sections.description: Basic personal details for each family member.

sections.name: Adoption Information
sections.description: Details about adopted family members.

sections.name: Pet Information
sections.description: Details about family pets.

sections.name: Previous Addresses
sections.description: Record of past residences.

sections.name: Current Resume
sections.description: Store copies of current resumes for all family members. Keep both digital copies and note where physical copies are located.

sections.name: Employment History
sections.description: Work history for family members.

sections.name: Schooling History
sections.description: Educational background for family members.

sections.name: Transcripts
sections.description: Store copies of official transcripts from all educational institutions. Note where originals and certified copies are located.

sections.name: Military History
sections.description: Military service records for family members.

sections.name: Groups & Organizations
sections.description: Memberships in clubs, organizations, and professional groups.

sections.name: Credit Report
sections.description: Store copies of credit reports. It is recommended to pull reports annually from each of the three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion).

sections.name: Document Location
sections.description: Where important documents are stored.

sections.name: Emergency Plan
sections.description: Emergency preparedness information for the household.

sections.name: Travel Information
sections.description: Frequent traveler accounts and loyalty programs.

sections.name: Safes and Storage
sections.description: Safe deposit boxes, home safes, and storage units.

sections.name: Tax Issues
sections.description: Federal and state income tax records.

sections.name: Property Tax Records
sections.description: Property tax information for owned real estate.

sections.name: Estimated Tax Payments
sections.description: Quarterly estimated tax payment records.

sections.name: Data Backup Plans
sections.description: How and where digital data is backed up.

sections.name: Passwords and Logins
sections.description: Website and service login credentials.

sections.name: Account Numbers
sections.description: Utility and service account numbers.

sections.name: Online Courses
sections.description: Online courses and educational subscriptions.

sections.name: Bank Accounts
sections.description: Checking, savings, and money market accounts.

sections.name: Investments
sections.description: Stocks, bonds, mutual funds, and other investment accounts.

sections.name: Retirement Plans
sections.description: 401(k), IRA, pension, and other retirement accounts.

sections.name: Private Business
sections.description: Information about privately owned businesses.

sections.name: Real Estate
sections.description: Owned real estate properties.

sections.name: Vehicles
sections.description: Cars, trucks, boats, RVs, and other vehicles.

sections.name: Valuables Inventory
sections.description: High-value items for insurance and estate purposes.

sections.name: Debts Owed to You
sections.description: Money others owe you.

sections.name: Other Assets
sections.description: Assets not covered in other sections.

sections.name: Subscriptions
sections.description: Recurring subscriptions and memberships.

sections.name: Loan Obligations
sections.description: Mortgages, car loans, student loans, and other loan accounts.

sections.name: Credit Cards
sections.description: All credit card accounts.

sections.name: Other Debts
sections.description: Personal debts, medical bills, and other liabilities.

sections.name: Life Insurance
sections.description: Life insurance policies for family members.

sections.name: Health Insurance
sections.description: Health and dental insurance coverage.

sections.name: Car Insurance
sections.description: Auto insurance policies.

sections.name: Other Vehicle Insurance
sections.description: Insurance for boats, RVs, motorcycles, and other vehicles.

sections.name: Homeowner/Renters Insurance
sections.description: Property insurance for homes and rental properties.

sections.name: Medical History
sections.description: Past illnesses, surgeries, and medical conditions.

sections.name: Prescription Medication
sections.description: Current prescriptions for family members.

sections.name: Extended Family Medical History
sections.description: Hereditary conditions and family health patterns.

sections.name: Long Term Health Care Directions
sections.description: Preferences for long-term care scenarios.

sections.name: Organ Donation
sections.description: Organ and tissue donation preferences.

sections.name: Medical Documentation
sections.description: Location of medical legal documents like living wills and healthcare proxies.

sections.name: Guardianship of Children
sections.description: Designated guardians for minor children.

sections.name: Final Arrangements
sections.description: End-of-life wishes and funeral preferences.

sections.name: Funeral Guest List
sections.description: People to notify and invite to funeral services.

sections.name: Eulogy Notes
sections.description: Notes and memories for eulogies.

sections.name: Personal Letters
sections.description: Letters to be delivered after passing.

sections.name: Estate Planning
sections.description: Estate planning contacts and document locations.

sections.name: Important Contacts
sections.description: Key people to contact in the event of an emergency or death.
